unit.scope: Full server vitest suite — zero regressions. Includes 6 new RED→GREEN tests for the atomic attach API + hadPriorWriter (first-attach-prewarm, multi-tab, re-attach-same-conn, post-detach-reload, reader-promotion-latch, back-to-back-race-fence).
